approvalNotes: Default approval token. Do not run canonical writes until a human reviewer records explicit approval.
requiredBeforeWrite: Human reviewer must set approvalStatus to APPROVED.
approvedBy and approvedAt must identify the approval event.
approvedRecordIds must match the intended ready canonical promotion ids.
canonical_write_authorization.v1.json must remain AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL until reviewed.
Both canonical write environment guards must be set manually only at execution time.
